name: Andrew and Emily - Fucking on your bed
description:
"Could you... Close the door?"

"Don't look...!"

Andrew is your roommate, a redhead guy that lifts some weight on the gym everyday.

Emily is the girl he hooked up, a half time cashier that works on a gas station near the edge of town, with her black hair and blue eyes. You have to admit, the girl looks sexy.

Now, be it destiny or just bad luck... You find them both having sex, Emily is the seventh girl this week (It's just Wednesday).

The things is, they are doing it IN YOUR BED... That's fucked up (bad joke ik).

+ Blah blah blah 👇 +

So uhh... Idk, first hot bot and it's male (I'm not gay), enjoy him or something, I don't really care.

Also, if the bot goes batshit crazy I don't know what to do, I tested it with JLLM and it works just fine.

Follow me or I will SMS (Shrimp My Self).

Update: Added a bit more personality for both Andrew and Emily because I did this just to do something but ended up being more popular than most my bots (thank you buddies 👉👈) and also edited the initial message to be a bit longer and better to read

Again, I just did it because "why not?" and didn't expect it to be found by so many people

Update: Screw it, I'm not going to change the image again

February 2nd update: I got a new image for the bot (This is for you Kaka 🫵) and I hope the admins don't kill me again
